basic_details.organization_name: Indian Navy - Directorate of Manpower Planning & Recruitment, Naval Headquarters, New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: Indian Navy has published the Agniveer Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup Apprentice posts. Apply online by June 29. Salary ₹30,000-40,000. Check eligibility, age limit, selection process, important dates, and apply online link here.

qualification.education_qualification: Passed Matriculation Examination with minimum 50% marks in aggregate from Boards of School Education recognised by Ministry of Education, Govt. of India AND completed a 3-year Diploma course from an AICTE-recognised Polytechnic Institute with minimum 50% marks in aggregate in any of the qualifying diploma trades (Engineering or Electrical as applicable).

selection_process: Stage I - INET → Stage II - PFT + Written Exam + Recruitment Medical → Pre-Enrolment Medical at INS Chilka
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only at https://joinindiannavy.gov.in. No other mode of application will be accepted. Applications can also be uploaded through Common Service Centres (CSC) across the country at a fee of ₹60 + GST (optional facility).
seo_tags: Indian Navy Agniveer (Apprentice) Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online
